description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a rectangular yard with green grass. The house features large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a rooftop terrace with a central pool, bordered by glass railings. The exterior is primarily composed of white and dark gray materials, with clean, geometric lines and a strong emphasis on horizontal and vertical planes. The property is enclosed by a low wall, and the outdoor area includes paved walkways, patio seating, and landscaped elements. The main entryway is sheltered by an overhang and is accessible via a paved path leading from the front gate. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an open, airy feel and ample outdoor living space.
description: A sleek, modern two-story house with a flat roof, rooftop pool, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved path, and the symmetrical facade with large windows and a rooftop pool visible above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, glass railings on the rooftop, and patio seating areas along the side yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, additional large windows, and the continuation of the flat roof and rooftop terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more patio space, landscaping, and the modern geometric lines of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, paved approach, and minimalistic door design, no columns or ornate features
